title: zekkie's asylum
description: Make your Minecraft experience even WORSE with horrible dimensions, unfunny memes and bad mobs!
body:
## The Problem
Minecraft mods, nowadays, are good. **TOO** good. People get bored super fast. You have sick looking weapons and blocks, and after 2 weeks of playing, people forget about playing _completely_. So why not give people an experience they'll never forget? One they'll remember for ages...

# zekkie's asylum
Have you ever wanted to play Minecraft the way how it wasn't intended to be played? Well, do I have a mod for you!
zekkie's asylum includes:

- Angry White Women
- The Samsung Galaxy Note 7
- Even worse structures
- new horrible dimensions
- new horrible mobs

and alot more things to make your Minecraft experience chaotic!

You don't beat the game by fighting the Ender Dragon. You have to fight the hardest boss, **the poopmonster**.
